headings.description: Used for all H1, H2, H3. Adds a modern, authoritative AI/consulting feel.

body.description: Clean, highly readable, adds a data-science/analytical tone.

mono.description: Used for tech stack badges, numbers, and stats counters.

spacing_and_layout.hero_composition: Split layout. 60% text/CTAs on left, 40% professional headshot on right. Particle background spans the entire hero container behind both.
spacing_and_layout.projects_grid: Asymmetric bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8). Project 1: col-span-12 md:col-span-8, Project 2: col-span-12 md:col-span-4, etc.

buttons.primary: bg-[#111111] text-[#F8F5F0] dark:bg-[#F8F5F0] dark:text-[#111111] hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.secondary: border border-[#4A3F35] text-[#111111] dark:border-[#E8DDD0] dark:text-[#F8F5F0] hover:bg-[#4A3F35] hover:text-[#F8F5F0] dark:hover:bg-[#E8DDD0] dark:hover:text-[#111111] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium

cards.style: bg-[#E8DDD0] dark:bg-[#1A1714] border border-[#4A3F35]/15 dark:border-[#E8DDD0]/15 rounded-sm p-8 shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
cards.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#E8DDD0]/70 dark:bg-[#1A1714]/70 border border-[#4A3F35]/15 dark:border-[#E8DDD0]/15 rounded-sm

badges.tech_stack: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-[#4A3F35]/20 dark:border-[#E8DDD0]/20 text-xs font-mono text-[#4A3F35] dark:text-[#E8DDD0] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#4A3F35]/10 dark:hover:bg-[#E8DDD0]/10 transition-colors

timeline.line: absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-px bg-[#4A3F35]/20 dark:bg-[#E8DDD0]/20
timeline.dot: absolute left-[-4px] top-1 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-[#4A3F35] dark:bg-[#E8DDD0]

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F8F5F0]/80 dark:bg-[#111111]/80 border-b border-[#4A3F35]/10 dark:border-[#E8DDD0]/10 transition-colors duration-300

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion. Initial: opacity-0, y-10. WhileInView: opacity-100, y-0. Transition: duration 0.6s, ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images inside project cards scale up slightly (scale-105) on card hover. Badges shift up by 2px on hover.
motion_and_interactions.loading_animation: Minimalistic loader. Number counter counting from 0 to 100 in JetBrains Mono, fading out to reveal the site.
motion_and_interactions.particles: Use react-tsparticles for the hero background. Particles should be small dots linked by thin lines, moving very slowly to represent neural networks/data connectivity. Color should adapt to light/dark mode.

image_urls.description: Professional smiling portrait of Mahi Vinod Soni
Abstract AI / Data Analytics representation for PharmaCortex
Financial stock market chart representation for AWS MLOps Risk Prediction
Neon blue line chart abstract for Inter-Stock Dynamics project

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Build the site using pure HTML/Tailwind for the main layout to preserve the creative bento grid. Do NOT rely heavily on default Shadcn container cards, instead implement the 'cards' style specified above.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use Inter, Space Grotesk, Roboto, or generic fonts. Import 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts or Fontshare.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles, badges) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='hero-resume-button').
CRITICAL: Implement a Dark/Light mode toggle. The default theme is LIGHT.
CRITICAL: Use 'react-tsparticles' for the particle background in the hero section. Ensure it covers the background fully and doesn't obstruct text (z-index).
CRITICAL: Use 'framer-motion' for scroll animations, animated statistics counters, and smooth reveal transitions.
CRITICAL: For icons, use 'lucide-react' or 'react-icons' for all social and UI icons. Do not use image-based icons.
CRITICAL: Ensure proper contrasting text colors over the Ivory/Beige/Black background as per the colors mapping.
Implement a smooth scrolling experience (can use basic CSS scroll-behavior: smooth or Lenis if preferred).
Ensure the hero section displays the CTA buttons ('View Projects', 'Download Resume', 'Contact Me') prominently.
For the Footer, use the exact text: 'Designed and Developed by Mahi Soni'.
